text: Artificial intelligence is changing many parts of our lives, from job applications to healthcare. This brings important ethical questions. A key concern is bias. If AI learns from data that has old prejudices, it can make unfair decisions. We must ensure fairness so that AI systems do not discriminate against certain groups. Privacy is another big issue; our personal information should not be misused. Companies also need to be transparent, explaining clearly how their AI works and what data it uses. Above all, we need responsible AI development. This means testing systems carefully to avoid harmful effects and creating rules to keep technology safe and beneficial for everyone.
